packets.thesis: Founder-first capital for innovative entrepreneurs at the intersection of gaming, crypto, and AI infrastructure. Struck Crypto is a permanent capital evergreen vehicle with $100M+ AUM investing in blockchain since 2017.
packets.gaming_ai_alignment: Struck Capital was the first investor in Mythical Games (Blankos Block Party, NFL Rivals) - a leading blockchain gaming unicorn. Their portfolio includes Zero Hash, 1inch, Algorand, and other crypto infrastructure plays. They actively invest in AI-powered gaming infrastructure and Web3 gaming platforms.
packets.hook_angle: First investor in Mythical Games - you understand blockchain gaming before it was mainstream. Your early conviction in gaming infrastructure (Mythical Games at $1.25B valuation) demonstrates thesis alignment with AI-powered game economies.

recent_investments.focus: Blockchain gaming, NFL Rivals, Blankos Block Party

packets.outreach_notes: Lead with gaming + crypto infrastructure angle. Reference Mythical Games investment as validation. Adam responds to bold, technically-sound pitches with strong founder-market fit.

packets.thesis: Leading early-stage fund focused on Sports, Lifestyle, and Gaming. Courtside invests in passionate entrepreneurs challenging the traditional definition of sports, digital media, fitness, and gaming. Recent $100M+ fund with Michael Jordan as LP.
packets.gaming_ai_alignment: Courtside has an explicit gaming mandate alongside sports and lifestyle. Deepen Parikh focuses on opportunities across esports, gaming, real-money betting, and digital media. Portfolio includes gaming-adjacent investments in interactive entertainment. Their sports gaming thesis directly overlaps with AI-powered gaming infrastructure.
packets.hook_angle: Courtside's sports x gaming thesis is perfectly positioned for AI-generated interactive content. Your investment in Beam (acquired by Microsoft) and The Athletic (acquired by NYT) shows conviction in digital media infrastructure. Gaming is explicitly one of your three core verticals.
packets.outreach_notes: Lead with gaming infrastructure for sports/entertainment. Reference Beam and The Athletic exits. Deepen is a lifelong sports fanatic who understands gaming as an extension of sports entertainment. Recent Fund III ($100M+) with Michael Jordan as LP provides momentum.

packets.thesis: Asia's leading blockchain advisory and asset management firm founded by former Goldman Sachs alumni. Spartan Group advises, invests, and builds with the best entrepreneurs in Web3. Spartan Capital manages liquid crypto assets while Spartan Labs builds ventures.
packets.gaming_ai_alignment: Spartan Group has explicit gaming and metaverse thesis within their Web3 mandate. They manage $500M+ in assets and have invested in 170+ companies over 7 years (37 investments in 2024 alone). Their crypto gaming focus includes infrastructure for blockchain gaming, NFT platforms, and Web3 game economies.
packets.hook_angle: Spartan Group's 37 investments in 2024 demonstrate active deployment in Web3 gaming and infrastructure. Your Asia-Pacific presence provides unique distribution access for AI-gaming platforms targeting the largest gaming market globally. Former Goldman Sachs alumni bring institutional credibility.
packets.outreach_notes: Lead with Asia gaming market expansion angle. Reference their 2024 investment pace (37 deals). Kelvin was former Goldman Sachs and Indus Capital - he responds to institutional-grade pitches with clear tokenomics.

packets.thesis: Tribe Capital uses product science and data science to design N-of-1 companies and investments. Founded in 2018 by Arjun Sethi (former Social Capital), Jonathan Hsu, and Ted Maidenberg. Tribe Crypto applies the same quantitative approach to crypto investing with a dedicated crypto-native data science team.
packets.gaming_ai_alignment: Tribe Capital has a dedicated Crypto practice and has launched Tribe Crypto Fund I (2022 vintage). Their data-driven approach uses proprietary AI and data science engines for underwriting. They invest in crypto infrastructure, DeFi, and gaming applications. Arjun Sethi is also co-CEO of Kraken (crypto exchange), providing unique exchange-level insights into gaming token economies.
packets.hook_angle: Tribe Capital's quantitative, AI-powered underwriting approach aligns perfectly with AI infrastructure for gaming. Arjun's dual role as co-CEO of Kraken provides unique visibility into gaming token economies and player behavior. Your 'product science' framework for identifying PMF is exactly what AI gaming infrastructure enables.
packets.outreach_notes: Lead with data-driven gaming infrastructure angle. Reference Kraken connection for gaming token economy insights. Tribe responds to pitches with strong metrics and quantitative validation. Arjun's Social Capital pedigree and Kraken role provide unique perspective.

packets.thesis: Wischoff Ventures invests in relentless early-stage, high-growth technology companies. Founded by Nichole Wischoff after leaving banking - she focuses on backing ambitious founders with high conviction at the earliest stages.
packets.gaming_ai_alignment: While not exclusively gaming, Wischoff Ventures has invested in NFT and gaming-adjacent startups. Nichole's thesis centers on relentless founders building in high-growth sectors including interactive entertainment and digital economies. Her focus on early-stage aligns with pre-seed gaming infrastructure plays.
packets.hook_angle: Nichole's 'relentless founders' thesis matches the persistence required to build AI gaming infrastructure. Your early-stage focus allows you to get conviction before others see the opportunity. NFT and digital asset investments show openness to gaming economies.
packets.outreach_notes: Lead with ambitious founder narrative. Reference her own story leaving banking to build a VC firm. Nichole responds to bold visions and relentless execution. Gaming + AI infrastructure fits her high-conviction, early-stage approach.
